criteriaResults.evidence: feedback-router.ts CHECKPOINT_TO_AGENT maps all 9 IDs. buildPlannerRetryPrompt uses exact format from contract.
Schema maxCheckpointIterations min:1 max:10 default:3. writeAbortMarker uses tmp+rename. CHECKPOINT_ITERATION_EXHAUSTED reason verified by test.
applyEditDelta backs up to <runsDir>/<runId>/edits/<id>.original.<ext> before atomic tmp+rename overwrite. Edit path skips reinvokeAgent.

'!!abort' prefix works. BUT: env var BOBER_CHECKPOINT_ABORT_TOKEN is never read from process.env. shouldAbort takes envAbortToken parameter, but no call site reads process.env['BOBER_CHECKPOINT_ABORT_TOKEN'] and passes it. grep confirms zero occurrences of the env var name in src/.
criteriaResults.feedback: Fix: in runCheckpointWithFeedback (or shouldAbort), default envAbortToken to process.env['BOBER_CHECKPOINT_ABORT_TOKEN'] when not explicitly passed. Add unit test that sets process.env['BOBER_CHECKPOINT_ABORT_TOKEN']='MYTOKEN', invokes the function without explicit envAbortToken, and verifies feedback containing 'MYTOKEN' triggers USER_ABORT. Use try/finally to restore env.

criteriaResults.evidence: renderSprintContract adds 'Previous feedback' section at iteration > 1. 5 tests verify.
4 distinct buildXxxRetryPrompt fns with different headings and placement (prepend vs append). Evaluator branch present but dead-code (no CheckpointId currently maps); generator notes acknowledge.
50 tests at src/orchestrator/checkpoints/feedback-router.test.ts (colocated). All required branches covered. Tests pass.

generatorFeedback.description: BOBER_CHECKPOINT_ABORT_TOKEN env var unwired. Default envAbortToken from process.env['BOBER_CHECKPOINT_ABORT_TOKEN'] when caller doesn't supply, and add a test using process.env to validate.

summary: Sprint 12 iter 1 fails s12-c4 only: env var BOBER_CHECKPOINT_ABORT_TOKEN not read from process.env. All other 7 criteria pass; all 4 strategies exit 0; 820 tests pass.
